## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Jason Gong (GrowthX) and Sara Lattanzio for content marketing and community building.](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX needs help with content distribution, community management, and shaping their workshop/content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Sara has expertise in content creation, social media marketing, and working with SaaS companies](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [They agreed to start with a trial collaboration on a content campaign before discussing longer-term engagement](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [GrowthX aims to build a developer-inspired marketing community and content library for marketers](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Current Marketing Efforts

  - [Jason leads growth, working on major clients and GrowthX's marketing](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Focus on creating high-quality content: podcast, community, workshops, in-person events](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Recently launched a paid community on Circle with \~20 paying members and 300 viewers](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [Workshops have attracted 1000+ attendees, including executive-level decision-makers](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Planning to launch their own product in the next 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)

### Sara's Background and Expertise

  - [Previously Head of Marketing, experienced in ABM and IT providers](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Currently collaborating with SEMrush and Tofu on content creation and promotion](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
  - [Strengths in creating social media content and product marketing](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [Launching a newsletter focused on practical, implementable AI marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=2754.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Help shape and manage GrowthX's community strategy](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
  - [Collaborate on creating and promoting webinars/workshops](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Develop frameworks and actionable content for marketers](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Assist in structuring GrowthX's content strategy and workshop topics](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Promote GrowthX's offerings to Sara's audience of content marketers](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)

### Community and Content Strategy Discussion

  - [Need for more structure in workshop frequency, duration, and accessibility](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [Suggestion to create tiered offerings: shorter free workshops and longer paid sessions](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
  - [Idea to focus on specific, actionable topics rather than broad overviews](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Potential to create content similar to developer-focused communities but for marketers](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=2534.0)

### Engagement Structure

  - [Agreed to start with a trial collaboration on a content campaign](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Discussed potential for monthly retainer or per-post arrangement in the future](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)
  - [Sara open to advisory roles but not interested in pure community management](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=2380.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to propose specific content assets for collaboration (2-3 over next two months)](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=2724.0)
  - [Explore creating a framework or guide similar to Growth.Design's content library](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=2855.0)
  - [Jason to consider the best communication channel (email or LinkedIn) for follow-up](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=2919.0)
  - [Discuss specifics of the trial collaboration, including topic, format, and promotion strategy](https://fathom.video/share/YPetVVQ3yayMv4wEck7uX4ryeuz8Dvgo?tab=summary&timestamp=2919.0)
